monday.question: What does 'promotion' mean in a work context?
Which word means 'the money you earn regularly for your work'?
Which of these is a profession?
What do you call the person who manages and directs other workers?
Complete: 'She is looking for a new _____ because she wants to earn more money.'
Complete: 'My _____ gave me a raise because I worked very hard this year.'
Complete: 'She has a great _____ in medicine — she has been a doctor for ten years.'
Translate to English: 'Ele trabalha em um escritório.'
Translate to English: 'Ela foi a uma entrevista de emprego ontem.'
monday.correctAnswer: she went to a job interview yesterday

tuesday.question: What does 'hire' mean?
What does 'resume' (or 'CV') mean?

What does 'meeting' mean?

tuesday.question: Which sentence correctly describes someone's job?

I do a lot of things.

tuesday.question: Choose the correct sentence:
options: She works as a lawyer at a big firm.
She works as lawyer at a big firm.
She work as a lawyer at a big firm.
She is work as a lawyer at a big firm.
tuesday.correctAnswer: She works as a lawyer at a big firm.

tuesday.question: How do you say 'Qual é a sua profissão?' in English?
Which of these professions works in a hospital?

Eu trabalho de forma autônoma, sem vínculo fixo.
tuesday.correctAnswer: Eu trabalho de forma autônoma, sem vínculo fixo.

tuesday.question: Complete: '_____ do you do for a living?' — 'I'm a graphic designer.'
Complete: 'My father works _____ an accountant at a local company.'
Complete: 'She is _____ architect. She designs buildings for large companies.'
Complete: 'He is looking for a job. He has his _____ ready to send to companies.'
'What do you do?' — 'I _____ as a nurse at the city hospital.'
'_____ do you do for a living?' — 'I'm a teacher.'

wednesday.question: What does 'company' mean?
What does 'fired' mean in a work context?
What does 'part-time' mean?
What does 'overtime' mean?
Which sentence uses Present Perfect correctly?
options: I have worked here for five years.
I worked here for five years.
I am working here for five years.
I work here since five years.
wednesday.correctAnswer: I have worked here for five years.

wednesday.question: Which sentence uses Present Perfect correctly?
options: She has been an employee since 2019.
She has been an employee for 2019.
wednesday.correctAnswer: She has been an employee since 2019.

wednesday.question: Choose the correct option: 'He has worked at this company _____ ten years.'
Choose the correct option: 'She has been the boss _____ March.'
What is the difference between 'for' and 'since' in Present Perfect?
options: 'For' is used with a point in time; 'since' is used with a duration.
'For' is used with a duration; 'since' is used with a point in time.
'For' is for the past; 'since' is for the future.
wednesday.correctAnswer: 'For' is used with a duration; 'since' is used with a point in time.

wednesday.question: Which sentence is INCORRECT?
options: I have had this job for three months.
She has worked here since last year.
They have been employees since two years.
He has been the manager for a long time.
wednesday.correctAnswer: They have been employees since two years.

wednesday.question: What does 'How long have you worked here?' mean?
options: Por quanto tempo você trabalha aqui?
wednesday.correctAnswer: Por quanto tempo você trabalha aqui?

wednesday.question: Which is the correct response to 'How long have you been a nurse?'
options: I have been a nurse for eight years.
I was a nurse for eight years.
I am being a nurse for eight years.
wednesday.correctAnswer: I have been a nurse for eight years.

wednesday.question: Complete: 'I have worked at this office _____ 2020.'
Complete: 'She has been the team leader _____ almost two years.'
Complete: 'How long _____ you worked in this company?'
Complete: 'He has _____ a doctor since he finished university.'

She has been the boss _____ January — that's almost a year now.
Translate to English: 'Ele trabalha nessa empresa há dois anos.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: he has worked at this company for two years

wednesday.question: Translate to English: 'Ela é funcionária desde março.'
wednesday.correctAnswer: she has been an employee since march

thursday.correctAnswer: She hasn't worked here for a long time.

thursday.question: Which word describes a person who works independently without a fixed employer?

options: How long have you been a teacher?
How long are you a teacher?
How long did you be a teacher?
Since when you are a teacher?
thursday.correctAnswer: How long have you been a teacher?

He applied to the job and got an interview.
He applied at the job and got an interview.
He applied the job and got an interview.
thursday.correctAnswer: He applied for the job and got an interview.

options: Ela trabalha no turno da noite.
thursday.correctAnswer: Ela trabalha no turno da noite.

friday.question: What does 'intern' mean?

friday.correctAnswer: They have not had a meeting since last Monday.

friday.correctAnswer: She works as a manager in our team.
